name: MCP AkTools
what_it_does: MCP server built on akshare that provides stock and cryptocurrency data query and analysis functions. Supports A-share, Hong Kong, and US stock markets plus crypto data from OKX and Binance. Includes stock search, pricing, financial indicators, market overview (limit-up boards, capital flows), historical data with technical indicators, and financial news.
use_cases: Query real-time stock prices and market cap data for Chinese A-shares
Retrieve historical price data with technical analysis indicators
Monitor A-share limit-up boards and sector capital flows
Get cryptocurrency prices and loan ratios from OKX
Access Binance AI reports and taker volume data
Look up financial news for specific stocks or global markets
Compare financial report indicators across A-share, HK, and US stocks
not_for: Western-market-only workflows (primary focus is Chinese markets)
best_when: You need programmatic access to Chinese stock market data (A-shares), Hong Kong/US stock indicators, or crypto data from OKX/Binance through an AI assistant.
avoid_when: You need only US/European market data with no Chinese market focus, or you need trade execution capabilities.

auth.notes: No authentication required. Optional environment variables for proxy/mirror URLs (OKX_BASE_URL, BINANCE_BASE_URL, NEWSNOW_BASE_URL).

pricing.notes: MIT licensed. Uses free akshare data. Upstream data sources (OKX, Binance) have their own rate limits.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Documentation is primarily in Chinese. Error handling not well documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only data queries are inherently idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Documentation and tool descriptions are primarily in Chinese
Relies on akshare upstream which may have rate limits or breakage
Crypto endpoints depend on OKX/Binance API availability
A-share market data only available during Chinese trading hours

security_score_components.security_notes: Community/specialized tool. Apply standard security practices for category. Review documentation for specific security requirements.
